arts.ttl: FIFA Puskas Award: No Bamford is an insult to Leeds man
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford can count himself incredibly unlucky that he has not been nominated for the 2024 Puskas Award for his stunning volley against Peterborough United. arts.sum: Leeds United forward Joe Gelhardt is the most likely January exit from Elland Road, with Rangers one of several clubs already forming a queue. Those clubs include Scottish giants Rangers, as well as Championship rivals Plymouth Argyle, Stoke City, Preston, and Portsmouth.
